title: create_note
description: Create or update a note in an Obsidian vault. Supports markdown content, YAML frontmatter, folder placement, and template application.

action.description: create: new note; update: overwrite content; append/prepend: add to existing

path.description: Note path relative to vault root (e.g. 'Projects/my-project.md')

content.description: Markdown content for the note body

template.description: Template note path to apply (copies template content and frontmatter)

overwrite.description: Allow overwriting existing note (for create action)
